suggestions.title: Hello! I'm LendoraAI
suggestions.subtitle: Your smart loan advisor. Tell me what you need!

items.label: Consumer Loan 5000 USD
items.value: I want a consumer loan of about 5000 USD, repaid over 24 months. What are my best options?

items.label: Home / Real Estate
items.value: I'm looking into a home loan of around 50 000 USD. What are the current conditions and rates?

items.label: Car / Vehicle Loan
items.value: I want to finance a car or motorbike. Which loan package fits and what are the rates?

items.label: Compare Rates
items.value: Help me compare current bank interest rates and choose the best package.

demoOffers.tagline: Great fit — longer term means lower monthly repayments.

demoResponses.default: I understand you're looking for loan information. Here are some packages that match your needs. Please review the terms and APR carefully before making a decision!
demoResponses.compare: To compare rates effectively, focus on the APR (Annual Percentage Rate) rather than just the nominal rate. APR includes all fees and other costs. Here are some top picks right now:
demoResponses.greeting:
Hello! I'm FINAI – your smart loan advisor 👋

I can help you:
• Find a loan package that fits your needs
• Compare interest rates across banks
• Explain loan conditions
• Guide you through secured or unsecured loan applications

How much do you need to borrow and what is it for?
